'''nafoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagogastrostomy|oesophagogastrostomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagogastrostomy|oesophagogastrostomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nafoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næfeseth|næfeseth]] || [[word:næfesej|næfesej]] || [[word:næfesesh|næfesesh]] || [[word:næfese|næfese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nafofosoth|nafofosoth]] || [[word:nafofosoj|nafofosoj]] || [[word:nafofososh|nafofososh]] || [[word:nafofoso|nafofoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nafosoth|nafosoth]] || [[word:nafosoj|nafosoj]] || [[word:nafososh|nafososh]] || [[word:nafoso|nafoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nafofsoth|nafofsoth]] || [[word:nafofsoj|nafofsoj]] || [[word:nafofsosh|nafofsosh]] || [[word:nafofsof|nafofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nafosotho|nafosotho]] || [[word:nafosojo|nafosojo]] || [[word:nafososho|nafososho]] || [[word:nafosoko|nafosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nafosoth|nafosoth]] || [[word:nafosoj|nafosoj]] || [[word:nafososh|nafososh]] || [[word:nafoso|nafoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nafosothol|nafosothol]] || [[word:nafosojol|nafosojol]] || [[word:nafososhol|nafososhol]] || [[word:nafosokol|nafosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nafosothotho|nafosothotho]] || [[word:nafosojojo|nafosojojo]] || [[word:nafososhosho|nafososhosho]] || [[word:nafosoko|nafosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nafosothon|nafosothon]] || [[word:nafosojon|nafosojon]] || [[word:nafososhon|nafososhon]] || [[word:nafosokon|nafosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nafosothoro|nafosothoro]] || [[word:nafosojoro|nafosojoro]] || [[word:nafososhoro|nafososhoro]] || [[word:nafosokoro|nafosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
